'''âw-th-g-ch''' ('''kawathgechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alternize|alternize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alternize|alternize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-th-g-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawathgechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathgechoko|thiwathgechoko]] || [[word:jiwathgechoko|jiwathgechoko]] || [[word:shiwathgechoko|shiwathgechoko]] || [[word:kiwathgechoko|kiwathgechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathgechoko|thuthuwathgechoko]] || [[word:jujuwathgechoko|jujuwathgechoko]] || [[word:shushuwathgechoko|shushuwathgechoko]] || [[word:kukuwathgechoko|kukuwathgechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathgechoko|thuwathgechoko]] || [[word:juwathgechoko|juwathgechoko]] || [[word:shuwathgechoko|shuwathgechoko]] || [[word:kuwathgechoko|kuwathgechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathgechoko|thuwathgechoko]] || [[word:juwathgechoko|juwathgechoko]] || [[word:shuwathgechoko|shuwathgechoko]] || [[word:kuwathgechoko|kuwathgechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathgechoko|thewathgechoko]] || [[word:jewathgechoko|jewathgechoko]] || [[word:shewathgechoko|shewathgechoko]] || [[word:kewathgechoko|kewathgechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathgechoko|thothowathgechoko]] || [[word:jojowathgechoko|jojowathgechoko]] || [[word:shoshowathgechoko|shoshowathgechoko]] || [[word:kokowathgechoko|kokowathgechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathgechoko|thowathgechoko]] || [[word:jowathgechoko|jowathgechoko]] || [[word:showathgechoko|showathgechoko]] || [[word:kowathgechoko|kowathgechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathgechoko|thowathgechoko]] || [[word:jowathgechoko|jowathgechoko]] || [[word:showathgechoko|showathgechoko]] || [[word:kowathgechoko|kowathgechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwathgechoko|thĂŠwathgechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwathgechoko|jĂŠwathgechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwathgechoko|shĂŠwathgechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwathgechoko|kĂŠwathgechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathgechoko|thathawathgechoko]] || [[word:jajawathgechoko|jajawathgechoko]] || [[word:shashawathgechoko|shashawathgechoko]] || [[word:kakawathgechoko|kakawathgechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathgechoko|thawathgechoko]] || [[word:jawathgechoko|jawathgechoko]] || [[word:shawathgechoko|shawathgechoko]] || [[word:kawathgechoko|kawathgechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathgechoko|thawathgechoko]] || [[word:jawathgechoko|jawathgechoko]] || [[word:shawathgechoko|shawathgechoko]] || [[word:kawathgechoko|kawathgechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
